# terrible_community_general_telegram (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `token` (String) Token identifying your telegram bot.

### Optional

- `api_args` (String) Any parameters for the method. For reference to default method, `SendMessage`, see https://core.telegram.org/bots/api#sendmessage.
- `api_method` (String) Bot API method. For reference, see https://core.telegram.org/bots/api.

### Read-Only

- `msg` (String) The message you attempted to send.
- `telegram_error` (String) Error message gotten from Telegram API.
